description: FIFTH PvP anchor (2025-07-19 22:47:59, #214 X:597 Y:597). [RFJ]Marty rally DEFEAT vs [PBT]FxCat garrison (+12 garrison supporters). THE TWO STANDING DATA ASKS IN ONE: (a) first ATTACKER-LOSES anchor (the far side of the near-even knife-edge), (b) first real battle with DUPLICATE JOINERS (4x Nora). Near-perfect mirror totals: 1,421,184 vs 1,421,819. Attacker WIPED (0 survivors); defender kept 261,433 (18.4%). Also notable: attacker ran NO MARKSMAN (inf 744,783 T11fc9 + lancer 676,401 T10.5fc9 only) with a weak lancer panel (+1719% atk vs +2647% inf); defender balanced T10.5 fc8-9. Input: Scenarios/Marty_Tygax_4Nora_Gen10_202507.json (1000 runs seed 4471).

defender.player: [PBT]FxCat garrison + 12 supporters (Milkyo, D Luffy, GaDzIK, HandsomeBoy, Duhmanda, AnRChIp, SelRuhlg, FxQat, Imags, Natty, fuqn chrust, JTT)

specials_note: Both sides: +20% troops A/D/L/H items, -20% enemy A/D items. NO pet buffs (older battle, 2025-07). Attacker widgets: Rally Attack +15%, Rally Lethality +15%. Defender widgets: Defender Defense +15%, Defender Health +15%. All in panel_pct.
skill_kill_oracle: Per-skill kills: att Gregory 17 triggers 64,253 kills (+rows 1/1/42); att Mia 27 / 23 triggers 32,814 kills / 17; att Blanchette 1 / 8x29,491 / 12x95,815 / 3 / 3x11,967. Def Magnus 1/7/1/37 (0 kills); def Freya 1 / 15 triggers 96,582 kills / 1 / 7 / 6x24,293 / 3; def Blanchette 9x22,553 / 13x41,484 / 3 / 12x47,434. Total skill-attributed: att ~234k of 1.16M dealt (~20%), def ~232k of 1.42M dealt (~16%) - HIGHER share than A4's ~7% (older-gen heroes, longer battle).
structural_ground_truth: (1) FIRST ATTACKER DEFEAT: near-mirror totals, defender won keeping 18.4% - pins the far side of the knife-edge and proves near-even rally-vs-garrison defenders fight at >= parity (the A1/A2 inference, now with a defender-win witness). (2) DUPLICATE JOINERS REAL DATA: 4x Nora attacker still LOST - and engine isolation shows joiners are NOT the inversion cause (0-joiner run also predicted 65% survivor win), so this anchor bounds duplicate-stacking only weakly; the base-matchup inversion dominates. (3) NO-MARKSMAN COMP: attacker inf+lancer only; defender's 268k marksman counter his 744k infantry with nothing symmetric back. (4) Attacker's lancer half (676k) had a MUCH weaker panel (+1719/+1551 atk/def) - the real army was weaker than its headline inf panel suggests.
prediction_failure_2026_07_08: Engine (post anchor-4 lock, def_k=0.45) predicts p_win=1.00 with 65-83% survivors for the attacker at ANY joiner count; reality = attacker wiped, defender 18.4%. Cliff back-calculation: the defender needs x1.35-1.45 effective strength under def_k=0.45 to reproduce the real defeat - i.e. near-even rally-scale defenders need ~parity output (def_k~1.0), exactly what anchors 1/2 taught. A5 disambiguates the A1/A2-vs-A3/A4 def_k tension: rally-vs-garrison at 1.4-1.9M scale => defender ~parity (A1/A2/A5); small solo attacks at 200-270k => defender ~0.5 (A3/A4). Confounded candidates (scale, rally-vs-solo, garrison population 10-13 players vs 1-2) all separate the five anchors identically; the size-dependent form def_k*N_def^(def_ed-1) with def_ed~1.34 encodes it with existing knobs.
